query:
SELECT id, title, 
  CASE WHEN content LIKE '%href=%' THEN 'Has Links' ELSE 'No Links' END as has_links,
  CASE WHEN content LIKE '%amazon%' OR content LIKE '%awin%' OR content LIKE '%cj.com%' OR content LIKE '%shareasale%' THEN 'Has Affiliate' ELSE 'No Affiliate' END as has_affiliate
FROM articles WHERE status = 'published' LIMIT 50;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user mexMZK3NDs3KsAz.c9d58c93f039 --database RymVrvaM7i66nf7Xs2w9Hu --execute SELECT id, title, 
  CASE WHEN content LIKE '%href=%' THEN 'Has Links' ELSE 'No Links' END as has_links,
  CASE WHEN content LIKE '%amazon%' OR content LIKE '%awin%' OR content LIKE '%cj.com%' OR content LIKE '%shareasale%' THEN 'Has Affiliate' ELSE 'No Affiliate' END as has_affiliate
FROM articles WHERE status = 'published' LIMIT 50;
